name: Coconut Custard (Satterly)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the hot water and shredded coconut. Let stand for 20 minutes.
2. Blend at high speed until smooth. Add the remaining ingredients. Blend until well mixed.
3. Pour into a greased glass dish.
4. Bake at 350°F for 60-70 minutes.
5. Cool on a wire rack and then chill in the fridge.
